plugins.name: tts
plugins.description: Speak Claude Code's replies aloud, with a Spoken output style and a fallback chain of TTS engines.

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Play a short completion chime when Claude Code finishes a turn.

plugins.name: sudo-askpass
plugins.description: Let the Bash tool run sudo by routing the password prompt through a native GUI askpass helper.

plugins.name: tmux-title
plugins.description: Rename the current tmux window to the project directory while Claude Code runs.

plugins.name: dev-commands
plugins.description: Personal slash commands: session id, cut-release, and deepen.

plugins.name: w1am-skills
plugins.description: Personal agent skills organized by category (naming-review, and more as they land).
